case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STAE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSIION, $1600.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STAE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSIION, $1600.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $1,600.00 US CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT DENISE THURMAN. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE CASE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
